summary: Athlete Dashboard rebuild testing completed. All 6 sections rendering correctly with dark theme. All navigation working. Frontend: 15/15 features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly makes 5 parallel API calls: programs, events, interactions, profile, gmail/status
Client-side stats computation working correctly (Schools Tracked, Response Rate, Replies This Week, Awaiting Reply)
School Spotlight correctly filters programs with signals (outreach_count > 0 or journey_rail not 'added')
Dark theme consistent - all sections use #1e1e2e or #1a1f2e backgrounds
Teal accent line (2px gradient) present at top of Greeting card
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing: 10 programs, 13 interactions, 4 events
context_for_next_testing_agent: Athlete dashboard at /board fully verified. All 6 sections working: (1) Greeting + Pulse with 4 stats, (2) Today's Actions with Follow-ups Due and Needs First Outreach, (3) School Spotlight with horizontal cards, (4) Who's Watching empty state, (5) Recent Activity feed with timeline dots, (6) Coming Up events. All navigation working: View all schools -> /pipeline, Open calendar -> /calendar, Browse Schools -> /schools, ActionRow clicks -> /pipeline/:programId, Activity items -> /pipeline/:programId.
